title: Path Sum
input_format: The root of a binary tree and an integer `targetSum`.
output_format: `true` if the tree has a root-to-leaf path such that adding up all the values along the path equals `targetSum`.
constraints:
- The number of nodes in the tree is in the range `[0, 5000]`.
- `-1000 <= Node.val <= 1000`
- `-1000 <= targetSum <= 1000`
function_signature: function hasPathSum(root: TreeNode | null, targetSum: number): boolean {}
